headline: A Look At Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) Valuation After EPA’s Higher Biofuel Blending Rule
summary: The EPA’s new rule increasing required biofuel blending in gasoline and diesel puts fresh attention on Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM), a major supplier of crop based feedstocks like soybean oil used in biofuel production. See our latest analysis for Archer-Daniels-Midland. ADM’s share price has climbed 23.35% over the past 90 days and 21.51% year to date to US$71.75. The 1 year total shareholder return of 54.72% contrasts with a slightly negative 3 year total shareholder return, suggesting...
